message.content:
I need to update all remaining view files that have `action_open_as_wizard` buttons in list views. 

For each of these files:
1. X:\03_ACG\Custom_Addons\project_custom_fields\views\activity_view.xml
2. X:\03_ACG\Custom_Addons\crm_custom_fields\views\activity_view.xml
3. X:\03_ACG\Custom_Addons\crm_business_dev\views\activity.xml
4. X:\03_ACG\Custom_Addons\employees_department_custom_fields\views\hr_department_form_anchor.xml
5. X:\03_ACG\Custom_Addons\hr_employee_fields_style\views\views.xml
6. X:\03_ACG\Custom_Addons\project_stage_activity_plans\views\project_project_views.xml
7. X:\03_ACG\Custom_Addons\project_change_order\views\change_order_view.xml
8. X:\03_ACG\Custom_Addons\ticket_system\views\hr_employee.xml

Read each file and identify lists that have `action_open_as_wizard` button. For each list:
- Add `editable="bottom"` to the `<list>` tag (if it's an embedded list in a form view, not a main tree view)
- Move the button element to the LAST position (after all fields, before closing `</list>`)
- Change button attributes to: `<button name="action_open_as_wizard" type="object" icon="fa-external-link" title="Open full wizard"/>`
- Remove unnecessary attributes like `string="Open"`, `class="btn-primary"`, and `context=...`

Make all necessary edits to these files. Report back which files were updated and what changes were made.

content.text: I'll read each file, identify the lists with `action_open_as_wizard` buttons, and make the necessary updates.

1	<odoo>
2	    <record id="view_business_opportunity_add_activities_tab" model="ir.ui.view">
3	        <field name="name">business.opportunity.form.add.activities.tab</field>
4	        <field name="model">business.opportunity</field>
5	        <field name="inherit_id" ref="view_business_opportunity_form"/>
6	        <field name="arch" type="xml">
7	            <xpath expr="//sheet/notebook" position="inside">
8	                <page string="Activities" name="activities_table_tab">
9	                    <field name="activity_ids" 
10	                           context="{
11	                               'default_res_model': 'business.opportunity', 
12	                               'default_res_model_id': %(model_business_opportunity)d, 
13	                               'default_res_id': id,
14	                               'mail_create_nosubscribe': True,
15	                               'mail_create_nolog': True,
16	                           }">
17	                        <list decoration-muted="custom_state == 'done'" 
18	                              decoration-danger="custom_state == 'cancelled'"
19	                              default_order="date_deadline desc"
20	                              >
21	                            <button name="action_open_as_wizard" type="object" icon="fa-external-link" string="Open" title="Open Activity Wizard" class="btn-primary" context="{'form_view_ref': 'mail.mail_activity_view_form_popup', 'target': 'new'}"/>
22	                            <field name="res_model" column_invisible="True"/>
23	                            <field name="res_model_id" column_invisible="True"/>
24	                            <field name="activity_type_id"/>
25	                            <field name="summary"/>
26	                            <field name="target_department_id" placeholder="Select Department..." column_invisible="context.get('default_res_model') != 'hr.department'"/>
27	                            <field name="target_document_item_id" placeholder="Select Document..."/>
28	                            <field name="custom_state" widget="badge" decoration-success="custom_state == 'done'" decoration-info="custom_state == 'planned'" decoration-danger="custom_state == 'cancelled'"/>
29	                            <field name="date_deadline"/>
30	                            <field name="user_id"/>
31	                        </list>
32	                    </field>
33	                </page>
34	            </xpath>
35	        </field>
36	    </record>
37	</odoo>

1	<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
2	<odoo>
3	    <!--
4	        Central inherit target (`view_department_form_inherit_custom`) for department form extensions.
5	        Provides `activities_table_tab` (Tickets) expected by project, meetings, notes, certifications, etc.
6	        (Content matches the former ticket_system tab; ticket_system no longer loads a duplicate view.)
7	    -->
8	    <record id="view_department_form_inherit_custom" model="ir.ui.view">
9	        <field name="name">hr.department.form.inherit.custom.anchor</field>
10	        <field name="model">hr.department</field>
11	        <field name="inherit_id" ref="hr.view_department_form"/>
12	        <field name="arch" type="xml">
13	            <!-- Odoo 18 core hr.department form has no notebook; insert after the main sheet group. -->
14	            <xpath expr="//sheet/group" position="after">
15	                <notebook name="hr_department_form_tabs">
16	                <page string="Tickets" name="activities_table_tab">
17	                    <field name="activity_ids"
18	                        context="{
19	                            'default_res_model': 'hr.department',
20	                            'default_res_model_id': %(hr.model_hr_department)d,
21	                            'default_res_id': id,
22	                            'mail_create_nosubscribe': True,
23	                            'mail_create_nolog': True,
24	                        }">
25	                        <list decoration-muted="custom_state == 'done'"
26	                              decoration-danger="custom_state == 'cancelled'"
27	                              default_order="date_deadline desc">
28	                            <button name="action_open_as_wizard" type="object" icon="fa-external-link" string="Open" title="Open Activity Wizard" class="btn-primary" context="{'form_view_ref': 'mail.mail_activity_view_form_popup', 'target': 'new'}"/>
29	                            <field name="res_model" column_invisible="True"/>
30	                            <field name="res_model_id" column_invisible="True"/>
31	                            <field name="activity_type_id"/>
32	                            <field name="summary"/>
33	                            <field name="custom_state" widget="badge" decoration-success="custom_state == 'done'" decoration-info="custom_state == 'planned'" decoration-danger="custom_state == 'cancelled'"/>
34	                            <field name="date_deadline"/>
35	                            <field name="user_id"/>
36	                        </list>
37	                    </field>
38	                </page>
39	                </notebook>
40	            </xpath>
41	        </field>
42	    </record>
43	</odoo>

content.text: Now I'll analyze each file and make the necessary edits. Let me process them one by one:

input.old_string:
<list create="1" default_order="date_deadline asc, id desc"
                            decoration-bf="activity_type_id.category == 'meeting'"
                            editable="bottom"
                            decoration-danger="date_deadline < current_date and custom_state != 'done'"
                            decoration-warning="date_deadline == current_date and custom_state != 'done'">
                            <field name="res_model" column_invisible="True"/>
                            <field name="res_model_id" column_invisible="True"/>
                            <field name="activity_type_id"/>
                            <field name="summary"/>
                            <field name="note_display" string="Note"/>
                            <field name="target_department_id" placeholder="Select Department..." column_invisible="context.get('default_res_model') != 'hr.department'"/>
                            <field name="target_document_item_id" placeholder="Select Document..."/>
                            <field name="custom_state" widget="selection_toggle"
                                decoration-success="custom_state == 'done'"
                                decoration-info="custom_state == 'planned'"
                                decoration-danger="custom_state == 'cancelled'"/>
                            <field name="date_deadline"/>
                            <field name="user_id"/>
                            <button name="action_open_as_wizard" type="object" icon="fa-external-link" string="Open" title="Open Activity Wizard" class="btn-primary" context="{'form_view_ref': 'mail.mail_activity_view_form_popup', 'target': 'new'}"/>
                        </list>
